name: License Plate Recognition
description: Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR/LPR). Detects and reads vehicle license plates in real time, voting one clean read per vehicle pass across multiple frames. Classifies the vehicle type, tracks crossing direction, estimates speed where a camera is calibrated, and matches every plate against user-defined named lists — each with an action (alert / allow / log) that drives event severity. Emits plate_read / whitelist_hit / blacklist_hit events with plate-crop snapshots.

fields.label: Capture zone
fields.help: Only plates whose box centre falls inside this zone are read (skip far / off-lane plates).

fields.label: Min plate width (px)
fields.help: Plates narrower than this are too far / blurry to OCR and are skipped.

fields.label: Plate detect confidence
fields.help: Detector confidence floor for a plate box (higher = fewer false plates).

fields.label: OCR confidence
fields.help: Minimum mean-character OCR confidence (0..1) for a read to count toward the vote.

fields.label: Min reads to confirm
fields.help: A vehicle must produce at least this many valid reads before its voted plate is emitted (rejects single-frame blips).

fields.label: Exit frames
fields.help: A plate gone this many processed frames means the vehicle has left — the read is then voted and emitted.

fields.label: Plate format (regex)
fields.help: Plate-format validation regex. Default = Indian plates incl. BH-series. Override for other regions.

fields.label: Allow non-matching reads
fields.help: Emit reads that don't match the plate-format regex (useful for unsupported regions). Off = drop them (recommended).

fields.label: Low-light enhancement
fields.help: Apply CLAHE contrast enhancement on dark frames before reading (helps night plates).

fields.label: Direction / speed line A
fields.help: Tripwire line — a vehicle crossing it is tagged in/out. Also line A for two-line speed calibration.

fields.label: Estimate speed
fields.help: ESTIMATE ONLY (single camera, needs calibration). Requires line A + line B + real-world distance, or a metres-per-pixel scale. Omitted if not calibrated.

fields.label: Speed line B
fields.help: Second tripwire a known distance from line A. Speed = distance / crossing-time.

fields.label: Line A↔B distance (m)
fields.help: Real-world distance between line A and line B in metres (for two-line speed estimation).
